description:
Happy Memorial Day! We want to take some time to highlight a wonderful organization working to provide veterans with service dogs. @K9sForWarriors is a non-profit on a mission to end veteran suicide. K9s provides service dogs – many of them rescues – to military veterans in need. Service dogs can be a light in the dark for these veterans. 

We are so happy to be able to highlight an organization that prioritizes saving lives on both ends of the leash – K9s is doing incredible work in the veteran
title: @K9sForWarriors is a non-profit on a mission to end veteran suicide by providing service dogs
